headline: Bernstein Reduces PT on Netflix (NFLX) on Near Term Margin Concerns
summary: ​On April 20, Bernstein SocGen Group reiterated an Outperform rating on Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) but lowered the price target on the stock from $115 to $110. The reduced price target is based on near-term margin concerns. Despite the concerns, Netflix ranks among the Best Stocks to Buy and Hold For the Next 5 Years. ​Analysts […]
